# Release v1.2.0

Updates the CLI to use `t3core` v1.2.0, adopting the newly exported `BoardField` type and cleaning up unused configuration files.

---

## Changelog

## [1.2.0] - 2026-05-17

### Added

- `BoardField` type now imported from `t3core` instead of being locally defined
- `jiti` dev dependency for improved TypeScript module loading

### Removed

- `AUDIT.md` — project audit tracking file
- `vitest.config.mts` — no longer needed after the test suite was removed in v1.1.0

### Changed

- Bumped `t3core` dependency from `^1.1.4` to `^1.2.0`
- Updated internal type imports in `Board.ts` and `colorLabelSymbol.ts` to use the exported `BoardField` type from `t3core`

[1.2.0]: https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core-cli/compare/v1.1.0...v1.2.0
